arts.ttl: Milan Identify Potential Replacement for Outgoing Star
arts.sum: It's only a matter of time before Theo Hernandez becomes a former Milan player after renewal talks broke down. According to Gazzetta dello Sport, the Frenchman will leave the San Siro either in the summer or 2026. The post Milan Identify Potential Replacement for Outgoing Star appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: European Giants on Red Alert as Milan Make Major Transfer Decision on Superstar Forward
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona are reportedly on red alert after news emerged over Rafael Leao's uncertain future at Milan. According to Gazzetta dello Sport, the Rossoneri could offload the Portuguese superstar in the summer transfer window. The post European Giants on Red Alert as Milan Make Major Transfer Decision on Superstar Forward appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: No UCL Berth Would Lead to Juventus and Milan Shakeups
arts.sum: Juventus and Milan are licking their wounds after their disappointing eliminations from the Champions League playoffs. Both teams missed out on at least €11M in UEFA prize money. arts.ttl: Aghehowa STUNNER leaves Chelsea counting cost of Joao Felix NIGHTMARE
arts.sum: Felix joined the Blues last summer for €52 million but made just three Premier League starts before being loaned out to Milan in January, with Chelsea already losing faith over the 24-year-old’s long-term future at Stamford Bridge. Chelsea had agreed a deal with Atletico Madrid for Aghehowa last summer as part of the transfer that took Conor Gallagher the other way but the move collapsed late on after a reported medical issue.
